game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **레이튼 교수와 악마의 상자 모바일 HD 리마스터**: "레이튼 교수와 악마의 상자" is a narrative-driven puzzle adventure game where players tap on the screen to move Professor Layton and Luke through various environments and interact with characters or objects. The core gameplay involves solving a series of integrated logic puzzles, presented as minigames, which are accessed by tapping on specific environmental hotspots or during dialogue sequences. Players can find "Hint Coins" (typically 3-5 per screen) by tapping suspicious areas, which can be spent (e.g., 1 coin for a basic hint, up to 3 for a direct clue) to assist with challenging puzzles. Progression is linear, with new story segments and locations unlocking only after mandatory puzzles are solved, and difficulty scales by introducing more complex puzzle types and requiring more abstract thinking as the narrative unfolds. The game features no failure state for puzzles, allowing unlimited retries, and is completed upon solving all story-critical puzzles to uncover the mystery's conclusion.
game_info.description: Guide Professor Layton through mysterious locations to uncover the truth behind the Devil's Box. Explore environments by navigating with arrow keys, collect Hint Coins hidden throughout each area, and solve increasingly challenging logic puzzles to progress. Use collected coins to purchase hints when puzzles become difficult. Complete all mandatory puzzles to unlock new story segments and reach the final revelation.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Professor Layton through the environment
Space: Interact with objects, characters, and hotspots / Confirm puzzle solutions
Z: Use a Hint Coin in puzzle mode (costs 1 coin)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and environmental interaction. Validates that the player can navigate through the environment, collect hint coins, and interact with puzzle hotspots. Ensures the game responds correctly to movement inputs and collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player around systematically to explore the current area. Attempt to collect visible hint coins by moving over them. Approach puzzle hotspots and interact with them using the space key. Test boundary collision by moving to edges of the playable area.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all four directions without passing through walls. Hint coins are collected when the player touches them, incrementing the coin counter. Puzzle hotspots trigger puzzle mode when interacted with. Player remains within valid boundaries throughout the test.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete game progression from start to finish by solving all mandatory puzzles. Validates that puzzle solutions are accepted correctly, story progression unlocks properly, and the win condition (GAME_OVER_WIN) is achieved. Tests the full gameplay loop including hint system usage.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through each area collecting hint coins. Solve each puzzle optimally by analyzing the puzzle type and providing correct answers. Use hints strategically on harder puzzles if needed. Progress linearly through all story segments by completing mandatory puzzles until reaching the final area and solving the climactic puzzle.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All puzzles are solved successfully with correct answers accepted. Story progression occurs after each mandatory puzzle completion. New areas unlock sequentially. Final puzzle completion triggers GAME_OVER_WIN state. Game demonstrates complete playability from start screen to victory screen.
